reasoning: As of June 22, 2025, the "Coalition of the Willing" remains a planning framework to provide a "reassurance force" in Ukraine only *after* a ceasefire or peace deal is achieved. Fighting in Ukraine continues with no imminent armistice. Even if a ceasefire were unexpectedly signed in late 2025, logistical and personnel constraints—including the fact that only six nations had committed troops as of April, and experts assess European nations lack the capacity to quickly deploy 25,000 soldiers for this mission—make physical deployment before December 31, 2025 highly improbable. The crowd forecast is 1%, and the evidence strongly aligns with this.
